response.justification: Strong senior engineer with broad full-stack experience, Linux/open-source background, and relevant skills in architecture and developer tooling. However, the role explicitly requires German at C1 level and the candidate self-reports only Basic German, which is a hard blocker for an executive-level leadership role requiring client advisory in German-speaking context. Formal people-leadership/team-management experience is also not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Deep multi-language engineering background with open-source/Linux affinity and own OSS projects (GISCollective, D libraries)
Workshop/teaching track record suggests mentoring and communication ability
Senior/staff roles at major tech companies plus founder experience across architecture and full-stack work
concerns: German listed as Basic — well below the required C1 proficiency
No explicit evidence of leading/mentoring an interdisciplinary team or executive-level responsibility
Limited demonstrated UML/formal modeling experience called for in the role

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal team-leadership track record
